nodes.label: Preserve Orange Money payment on page move
nodes.rationale: Moving the sales page must not break the Orange Money payment flow or auth on the new service route.
nodes.norm_label: preserve orange money payment on page move

nodes.label: orders.payment_reference
nodes.rationale: Nullable text column stores Orange Money tokens as stringified JSON; cash orders may leave it NULL.

nodes.label: grant_course_access_automatic
nodes.rationale: Bypasses admin role check so Orange Money webhooks can grant course access automatically; uses security definer to bypass RLS.

nodes.label: grant_course_access
nodes.rationale: Kept for cash payments where an admin must manually grant access.

nodes.label: POST /api/resend/add-contact
nodes.rationale: Contact sync is async and non-blocking so signup succeeds even if Resend fails.

nodes.label: OTP Requestor
nodes.rationale: Identifies the merchant app for OTP-authenticated Orange Money transactions; typically permanent unlike Access Token.

nodes.label: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
nodes.rationale: Bypasses RLS for backend updates like payment_reference; must never be exposed client-side or committed to Git.

nodes.label: Supabase Custom SMTP
nodes.rationale: Default Supabase email can fail or land in spam; professional SMTP (Resend preferred) improves deliverability.

nodes.label: Supabase Redirect URLs
nodes.rationale: Exact allowlisted redirect paths prevent 'requested path is invalid' on password reset and auth callbacks.

nodes.label: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
nodes.rationale: Required for absolute email confirmation and Orange Money return/cancel/notif URLs; prefer stable custom domain over VERCEL_URL.

nodes.label: Client phone PIN/OTP confirmation
nodes.rationale: Client confirms with their own Orange Money phone and PIN/OTP; merchant credentials only initiate the payment.

nodes.label: Email deliverability / spam score
nodes.rationale: Spam score 8.21 destroyed reset emails; fix via transactional SMTP plus SPF/DKIM/DMARC and cleaner templates.

nodes.label: Auth callback code exchange
nodes.rationale: Callback must verify email_confirmed_at after code exchange; expired/reused/wrong-type codes leave email unverified.

nodes.label: Currency OUV sandbox / XOF production
nodes.rationale: Currency is derived from ORANGE_MONEY_ENV: OUV when not production, XOF when production; missing env yields undefined currency on the payment page.

nodes.label: orders status failed
nodes.rationale: New failed status marks payment failures so pending orders are not left ambiguous; old pending orders for the same course are auto-failed on retry.

nodes.label: hasPaidAccess button guard
nodes.rationale: Homepage checks paid orders and course_access to disable CTA and prevent double payment.

nodes.label: Double payment protection on /api/orders
nodes.rationale: API rejects new order creation when an existing paid order exists for the same user and course.

nodes.label: payment_method routing (orders API)
nodes.rationale: Orders route to Orange Money, PayTech, or Moneroo endpoints based on payment_method; Orange Money code left unchanged for compatibility.

nodes.label: ngrok for local Orange Money webhook
nodes.norm_label: ngrok for local orange money webhook

nodes.label: notif_token webhook authenticity
nodes.rationale: notif_token from initiation must match webhook payload to verify notification authenticity.

nodes.label: PayTech API https://paytech.sn/api
nodes.rationale: Official docs replace separate sandbox/production engine hosts with a single paytech.sn/api base; env is a request body field (test|prod).

nodes.label: PayTech webhook HMAC-SHA256 verification
nodes.rationale: HMAC-SHA256 on hmac_compute is the recommended authenticity check; SHA256 of API key/secret is the classic fallback.

nodes.label: Supabase Enable email confirmations
nodes.rationale: Re-enabling email confirmation improves security and validates user email addresses after it was disabled during auth setup.

nodes.label: vbsniperacademie.com NXDOMAIN
nodes.rationale: Custom domain DNS not configured yet; use Vercel *.vercel.app URL via NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL until DNS is ready.

nodes.norm_label: vb sniper academie password reset email
